blocks.content:
**Three bets to fix this for good.**

Not patches. Foundations.

blocks.alt: Auto-recovery ladder: Level 0 silent auto-fix, Level 1 prompted fix, Level 2 guided rescue, Level 3 checkpoint restart, Level 4 section reset — try the cheapest fix first

blocks.content:
**Bet 1 · Auto-recovery engine**  
Graduated 0→4 fallback, building on the v2.5.0 resilience pipeline *(#716, #768)*.  
*→ Most recoveries should be silent.*

**Bet 2 · E2E testing for guides**  
Playwright harness + the `data-test-*` contract *(#540, #544)*.  
*→ CI catches breakage before users do.*

**Bet 3 · Carrot & stick on testids**  
Repeat the v2.4.2 audit *(~100 testids, #711)* across the rest of Grafana.  
*→ Reward thoughtful selectors. Refuse the rest.*

blocks.title: Live: Pathfinder + Assistant share the sidebar

blocks.content: **What you'll do.** A 30-second tour showing Pathfinder and the Grafana Assistant working side-by-side in the sidebar — the safe surface alongside Pathfinder's full-screen mode.
Open the Grafana Assistant from the toolbar, then say hi to it.
**What you saw.** Pathfinder and the Assistant share the sidebar — two AI surfaces in one panel without fighting for screen real estate. The integration story we want to keep building.
